ddt:Target.Name: SCU_BCB_HHNDB45_C1AHS_v7
ddt:Target.Description:
[10] 2021/10/19 Renault DEA-SAF6 Florian Petiot - Autoident corrected
[9] 2021/09/07 Renault DEA-SAF6 Florian Petiot - UDS service $31 added to erase the learning value - Park button voltage DIDs corrected - Screens updated
[8] 2021/08/10 Renault DEA-SAF6 Florian Petiot - Autoident updated
[7] 2021/07/20 Renault DEA-SAF6 Florian Petiot - ODO_TRIP_METER DID unit correction
[6] 2021/06/01 Renault DEA-SAF6 Florian Petiot - DTC list updated - Autoidentification parameters updated
[5] 2021/05/18 Renault DEA-SAF6 Florian Petiot - Autoidentification parameters updated
[5] 2021/02/09 Renault DEA-SAF6 Florian Petiot - Now also applicable to HHN DB45
[4] 2020/11/10 Renault DEA-SAF6 Florian Petiot - Only applicable to BCB (PZ1A has a specific database) - DTC update and clarification - Screen update - DID value calculation corrected - Update of the auto-identification parameters
[3] 2020/02/20 Renault DEA-SAF6 Florian Petiot - Correction of the auto-identification parameters
[2] 2019/12/06 Renault DEA-SAF6 Florian Petiot - Correction of the errors with the DIDs - Creation of the screens
[1] 2019/09/26 Nissan XX6 M.Hoshino Modified Item: FFD.
[N] 2019/08/02 Nissan XX6 M.Hoshino Initial Creation. < ItemList: PZ1A_SCU_ItemList_N.xlsx >

Item.Text: [P07E9]Shift Position Sensor signal out of range failure (S1 to S8)
[P07EA]Shift Position Sensor signal short to GND (S1 to S8)
[P07EB]Shift Position Sensor signal open failure (S1 to S8)
[P0850]Shift Position Sensor signal out of range
[P0851]Shift Position Sensor signal short to GND
[P18A8]Shift Position Sensor signal Park/ No Park
[P272A]Actuator driver output (U, V, W) (circuit short to ground or open )
[P272B]Actuator driver output (U, V, W) (circuit short to battery )
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
[P0681] Shifter internal failure (S1 to S6 all to 0 logic)
[P07E9] Shift position sensor signal open failure (S1 to S6, one or several are OoR)
[P07EA]Shift position sensor signal open failure - S1 to S6, one or several are <0.6V
[P07EB]Shift position sensor signal open failure - S1 to S6, one or several are >4.5V
[P07EC]Shifter internal failure- S1 to S6 all to 1 logic or with a non existing combination
[P0850] Shift position sensor signal out of range (P1 and / or P2 OoR)
[P0851] Shift position sensor signal short to GND (P1 and / or P2 <0.6V)
[P0852] Shift position sensor signal open failure (P1 and / or P2 >4.5V)
[P18A8] Shift position sensor signal failure (P1 and P2 are set to 0,0 or 1,1)
[P272A] Actuator driver output circuit (U, V, W) short to ground or open
[P272B] Actuator driver output circuit (U, V, W) short to battery
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: systemSupplierIdentifier
Data.Comment: Name and address information of the supplier.

Item.Text: Sleep or Crank fault, Disable DiagMuxDTC
Not available (init or lever switched failure)

Data.Name: RCTL.DataIdentifier
Data.Comment: Data Identifier received in reply to RoutineControl request

Device.Name: [P0681] Shifter internal failure (S1 to S6 all to 0 logic)
[P07E9] Shift position sensor signal open failure (S1 to S6, one or several are OoR)
[P0852] Shift position sensor signal open failure (P1 and / or P2 >4.5V)
[P0851] Shift position sensor signal short to GND (P1 and / or P2 <0.6V)
[P0850] Shift position sensor signal out of range (P1 and / or P2 OoR)
[P272B] Actuator driver output circuit (U, V, W) short to battery
[P272A] Actuator driver output circuit (U, V, W) short to ground or open
[P18A8] Shift position sensor signal failure (P1 and P2 are set to 0,0 or 1,1)
[P07EA]Shift position sensor signal open failure - S1 to S6, one or several are <0.6V
[P07EC]Shifter internal failure- S1 to S6 all to 1 logic or with a non existing combination
[P07EB]Shift position sensor signal open failure - S1 to S6, one or several are >4.5V

Label.Text: Erase the park actuator learning value
2) Right after IGN OFF, start an extended session by pressing on the following button:
1) From IGN ON, perform an IGN OFF
3) Erase the learning value by pressing on the following button:
5) Perform an IGN ON, the learning value is reset
